Precondition: Box_1 is on top of box_2 and both end effectors are free.
Postcondition: Box_1 is grasped with the left and right end effectors.

Precondition: The robot is holding box_1 with both end effectors and the area to the right of box_2 on the table is clear.
Postcondition: Box_1 is placed on the table to the right of box_2 and both end effectors are released.

Precondition: Box_1 is positioned right of box_2 on the table and both end effectors are free.
Postcondition: Box_2 is grasped with the left and right end effectors.
